overview: ABR College of Engineering and Technology (ABRCET) was established in 2008 by Sri A. Basi Reddy under the ABR Educational Society. Located in Chinairlapadu Village, Kanigiri, Prakasam District, Andhra Pradesh, the institute operates a sustainable 25-acre green campus. ABRCET focuses on imparting technical and management education to bridge the gap between industrial demands and student skills.
accreditation: Approved by AICTE, New Delhi and permanently affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK).

nirfRanking.engineering: Not Ranked in Top NIRF Categories

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech (Computer Science, Electronics & Communication, Electrical & Electronics, Mechanical, Agricultural, Geo-Informatics, Mining)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹43,000 per year (Category A Convener Quota Approx. / Total course approx. ₹1,68,400 - ₹1,72,000)
₹35,000 – ₹75,000 per year depending on admission category

coursesAndFees.program: Diploma (Polytechnic in Civil, Mechanical Engineering, etc.)

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: Data not explicitly specified by convener quota standard structures

placements.placementRate: Up to 85% reported for top batches (like 2024)
placements.companiesVisited: 30+ recruiters globally and domestically across sectors

admissions.admissionProcess: UG engineering admissions are primarily allocated through AP EAPCET counseling administered by APSCHE for Category A seats. Management seats (Category B) are fulfilled based on institutional merit guidelines. MBA admissions require APICET qualification.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions process aligns with the yearly timelines published by APSCHE, commonly spanning June to September.

campus.specialNote: The institute houses a business school alongside its technology department and offers an ecosystem that actively drives co-curricular events and NSS social activities.

closingRanks2024.OC Boys: General cut-off ranks vary heavily by counselling phase

hostelAndScholarships.hostelFee: Fees fluctuate according to baseline room maintenance and environmental configurations
hostelAndScholarships.messFee: Generally combined or evaluated periodically alongside canteen usage
scholarships: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD) for eligible state candidates
Institution level concessions for merit performers

contact.address: ABR Nagar, Chinairlapadu Village, Kandukur Road, Kanigiri Mandal, Prakasam District - 523254, Andhra Pradesh, India
